name: Radiance Vitamin C Serum
shortDescription: Brightening serum with 15% Vitamin C complex for luminous, even skin tone.
description: Our Radiance Vitamin C Serum is a powerful brightening formula enriched with a stable 15% Vitamin C complex, ferulic acid, and vitamin E. This lightweight serum absorbs quickly to neutralize free radicals, fade dark spots, and boost collagen production for a visibly brighter and more youthful complexion. Suitable for all skin types.
howToUse: Apply 3-4 drops to clean, dry skin in the morning before moisturizer and SPF. Gently pat until absorbed. Follow with moisturizer.
ingredients: Aqua, Ascorbic Acid (15%), Ferulic Acid, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Niacinamide, Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin, Panthenol, Allantoin

name: Deep Hydration Serum
shortDescription: Intensive hyaluronic acid serum delivering deep, long-lasting moisture.
description: Formulated with three molecular weights of Hyaluronic Acid to hydrate every layer of the skin. This ultra-lightweight serum plumps fine lines, strengthens the skin barrier, and delivers 72-hour hydration. Perfect for dehydrated and dry skin types.
howToUse: Apply 3-5 drops to slightly damp skin morning and evening. Layer under moisturizer for best results.
ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Hyaluronate (3 weights), Panthenol, Glycerin, Niacinamide, Ceramides, Allantoin, Peptide Complex

name: Retinol Renewal Night Serum
shortDescription: Advanced retinol formula for targeted anti-aging and skin renewal.
description: Our encapsulated Retinol Night Serum combines 0.5% retinol with a barrier-strengthening complex to effectively reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles while minimizing potential irritation. Wake up to smoother, firmer, more refined skin.
howToUse: Use in the evening only. Apply a pea-sized amount to clean, dry skin 2-3 times per week. Always use SPF the following morning.
ingredients: Aqua, Retinol (0.5%), Ceramides, Peptide Complex, Squalane, Niacinamide, Vitamin E, Allantoin

name: Luxe Daily Moisture Cream
shortDescription: Lightweight daily cream that balances, hydrates and protects skin all day.
description: The Luxe Daily Moisture Cream is a versatile, skin-perfecting moisturizer that absorbs instantly, leaving skin soft, smooth, and velvety. Formulated with botanical extracts, ceramides, and a peptide complex to nourish and protect the skin barrier throughout the day.
howToUse: Apply morning and evening to cleansed skin. Massage gently in upward circular motions until fully absorbed.
ingredients: Aqua, Shea Butter, Ceramides, Peptide Complex, Jojoba Oil, Aloe Vera, Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, Vitamin E

name: Overnight Repair Cream
shortDescription: Rich night cream with restorative complex for rejuvenated skin by morning.
description: Wake up to transformed skin with our Overnight Repair Cream. This deeply nourishing night cream is powered by a bio-renewal complex, adaptogens, and plant-derived stem cells to regenerate, repair, and restore your skin's natural radiance while you sleep.
howToUse: Apply generously to face and neck as the last step of your evening routine. Leave on overnight and rinse in the morning.
ingredients: Aqua, Shea Butter, Plant Stem Cells, Adaptogen Complex, Retinyl Palmitate, Ceramides, Squalane, Rose Hip Oil, Peptides

name: Pore-Refining Gel Moisturizer
shortDescription: Oil-free gel cream that hydrates, minimizes pores and controls shine.
description: A featherweight, oil-free gel moisturizer designed for combination and oily skin types. This water-based formula instantly quenches skin's thirst while Niacinamide minimizes the appearance of pores and controls excess sebum production for a matte, shine-free finish that lasts all day.
howToUse: Apply a thin layer to cleansed skin morning and evening. Ideal as a lightweight base under makeup.
ingredients: Aqua, Niacinamide (10%), Hyaluronic Acid, Salicylic Acid (0.5%), Zinc PCA, Centella Asiatica, Allantoin

name: Gentle Foam Cleanser
shortDescription: pH-balanced foaming cleanser that removes impurities without stripping moisture.
description: A luxuriously gentle foam cleanser that effectively removes makeup, excess oil, and impurities while maintaining the skin's natural moisture balance. Enriched with Aloe Vera, Chamomile, and Amino Acids, this cleanser leaves skin feeling clean, calm, and comfortable — never tight or dry.
howToUse: Wet face, pump 2-3 times into palm, work into a lather and massage over face for 60 seconds. Rinse thoroughly. Use morning and evening.
ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Aloe Vera, Chamomile Extract, Amino Acids, Panthenol, Allantoin, Citric Acid

name: Brightening Micellar Water
shortDescription: No-rinse micellar water that lifts impurities while brightening skin tone.
description: This innovative micellar cleansing water uses the power of tiny micelle molecules to effortlessly dissolve and lift away makeup, dirt, and oil without any harsh rubbing. Infused with Vitamin C and Rose Water to gently brighten skin while you cleanse — no rinsing required.
howToUse: Saturate a cotton pad and sweep over face, eyes, and lips. No rinsing required. Can be used as a first-step cleanser or refresher on the go.
ingredients: Aqua, Polysorbate 20, Glycerin, Rose Water, Ascorbic Acid (Vit C), Panthenol, Chamomile Extract

name: Balancing Rose Petal Toner
shortDescription: Alcohol-free rose toner that balances, softens, and preps skin for better absorption.
description: Our alcohol-free Balancing Rose Petal Toner is a calming, skin-prepping toner formulated with real rose water, Hyaluronic Acid, and Niacinamide. It gently refines pores, restores pH balance, and creates the ideal canvas for serums and moisturizers to penetrate deeply.
howToUse: After cleansing, apply to a cotton pad or directly to hands. Sweep or pat gently across face and neck morning and evening.
ingredients: Rose Water, Aqua, Glycerin, Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, Centella Asiatica, Panthenol, Allantoin

name: AHA Exfoliating Toner
shortDescription: Chemical exfoliant with AHAs to reveal brighter, smoother skin texture.
description: Our AHA Exfoliating Toner uses a blend of Glycolic and Lactic Acids to gently dissolve dead skin cells, revealing a brighter, more even complexion. Enriched with Hyaluronic Acid and Aloe Vera to counteract any potential irritation, leaving skin smooth and glowing, not sensitized.
howToUse: Apply with a cotton pad to cleansed skin 2-3 times per week in the evening. Avoid eye area. Always follow with SPF the next morning.
ingredients: Aqua, Glycolic Acid (5%), Lactic Acid (3%), Hyaluronic Acid, Aloe Vera, Niacinamide, Allantoin

name: Deep Purifying Clay Mask
shortDescription: Kaolin & bentonite clay mask that deep cleanses and minimizes pores.
description: This detoxifying clay mask draws out impurities, absorbs excess oil, and visibly minimizes pores in just 10 minutes. The unique blend of Kaolin and Bentonite clays is balanced with soothing Aloe Vera and Centella Asiatica to ensure skin feels purified, not stripped.
howToUse: Apply a thin, even layer to clean, dry skin, avoiding the eye area. Leave on for 10-15 minutes until dry. Rinse thoroughly with warm water. Use 1-2 times per week.
ingredients: Aqua, Kaolin Clay, Bentonite, Aloe Vera, Centella Asiatica, Salicylic Acid (0.5%), Glycerin, Tea Tree Oil

name: Brightening Sleeping Mask
shortDescription: Luxurious overnight mask that brightens and transforms skin while you sleep.
description: Our bestselling Brightening Sleeping Mask is a true overnight skin transformation treatment. This rich yet non-greasy mask works with your skin's natural nocturnal repair cycle, flooding cells with a potent blend of Vitamin C, Niacinamide, and fruit extracts to fade dark spots and deliver a glowing complexion by morning.
howToUse: Apply as the final step of your evening routine, 2-3 times per week. No rinsing required. Wake up to bright, luminous skin.
ingredients: Aqua, Niacinamide, Ascorbic Acid (Vit C), Mulberry Extract, Licorice Root Extract, Ceramides, Hyaluronic Acid, Centella Asiatica

name: Peptide Firming Eye Cream
shortDescription: Advanced peptide eye cream targeting fine lines, puffiness, and dark circles.
description: The ultimate multi-tasking eye treatment, combining 8 active peptides with Caffeine and Vitamin K to simultaneously target fine lines and wrinkles, reduce puffiness, and fade the appearance of dark circles. The ultra-lightweight gel-cream texture absorbs instantly without pilling under makeup.
howToUse: Using the cooling metal tip, apply by tapping around the orbital bone morning and evening. Use your ring finger for gentle, precise application.
ingredients: Aqua, Peptide Complex (8 Peptides), Caffeine, Vitamin K, Hyaluronic Acid, Ceramides, Retinyl Palmitate, Allantoin

name: Invisible Shield SPF 50+
shortDescription: Lightweight, invisible mineral SPF 50+ with skin-care benefits built in.
description: Your daily skin shield with a luxurious skin-care feel. This ultra-lightweight broad-spectrum SPF 50+ uses mineral UV filters (Zinc Oxide + Titanium Dioxide) for superior protection with no white cast. Enriched with Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, and Antioxidants, it doubles as a moisturizer and makes the perfect makeup base.
howToUse: Apply generously as the final step of your morning skincare routine. Reapply every 2 hours when exposed to direct sunlight.
ingredients: Zinc Oxide (8%), Titanium Dioxide (5%), Aqua, Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, Vitamin C, Vitamin E, Glycerin

name: Soothing Centella Essence
shortDescription: Calming centella asiatica essence to reduce redness and strengthen barrier.
description: A lightweight, multi-functional essence powered by 70% pure Centella Asiatica extract to calm inflammation, reduce redness, and accelerate the skin's healing process. Perfect for sensitized skin, post-procedure care, or simply as a daily calming treatment after cleansing.
howToUse: After cleansing, pat onto face using hands. Layer under serum and moisturizer for enhanced soothing benefits.
ingredients: Centella Asiatica Extract (70%), Aqua, Glycerin, Madecassoside, Asiaticoside, Ceramides, Panthenol

name: Complete Skincare Collection
shortDescription: The ultimate Munera skincare set for a complete daily routine.
description: The Munera Complete Skincare Collection is the perfect introduction to our full range. This curated set includes our bestselling Gentle Foam Cleanser, Balancing Rose Toner, Radiance Vitamin C Serum, and Luxe Daily Moisture Cream — everything you need for a transformative morning and evening skincare routine.
howToUse: See individual products for usage directions. Use in the order listed: cleanser → toner → serum → moisturizer.
